results.title: Bethlehem takes Game 1 of Section 2 Class AA baseball series
results.description: Bethlehem continued to act like anything but an eight seed on Friday, shutting out second-seeded Mohonasen 9-0 in Game 1 of the Section 2 Class AA Baseball Tournament best-of-three series Friday at Joseph L. Bruno Stadium.

results.title: "Lost 800 Million Won in Jeonse Deposit": Check This Before Wiring Money
results.description: Korean financial regulators will require banks to display "(Group)" next to voluntary organization account names starting next month, after rental fraud cases using personal-looking group accounts caused losses of up to 800 million won.

results.title: Thinkerbell and Inclusively Made launch AI platform to reduce disability bias in advertising
results.description: Thinkerbell and Inclusively Made have launched Inclusivelymade.ai, a tool that embeds disability inclusion checks into advertising and film production from the idea stage. Backers include Nine, Bupa, Woolworths, and Mastercard.

results.title: Osmania University Hosts Online Awareness Programme on Knimbus Digital Library Platform
